Scheme Name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
Target Beneficiaries: Bottom 40% of population (50+ crore people), All citizens 70+ years
Coverage Amount: ₹5 Lakh per family per year (₹10 Lakh for Gujarat)
Diseases Covered: 1,929 procedures across 25 specialties: Cardiology (heart attack, bypass surgery, angioplasty, valve replacement), Oncology (all cancers - chemotherapy, radiotherapy, surgery), Neurosurgery (brain tumors, stroke, spine surgery), Nephrology (kidney transplant, dialysis, kidney stones), Orthopedics (joint replacement, fractures, spinal surgery), Pulmonology (TB, pneumonia, COPD), Gastroenterology (liver disease, pancreatitis, GI bleeding), Ophthalmology (cataract, glaucoma, retinal surgery), ENT (tonsillectomy, sinus surgery), Maternity care (C-section, delivery), Pediatrics (neonatal care, congenital disorders), Mental health (depression, anxiety, schizophrenia hospitalization), Infectious diseases (malaria, dengue, HIV/AIDS), Diabetes complications, Hypertension complications, Burns, Trauma care, Organ transplants (kidney, liver, heart), Bone marrow transplant, Cardiac surgeries, Respiratory disorders
Not Covered: OPD consultations, Cosmetic procedures, Fertility treatments (IVF), Organ donation costs, Drug rehabilitation unless admitted

Target Beneficiaries: Central Government employees, pensioners, MPs, judges, families
Coverage Amount: Comprehensive coverage based on package rates
Diseases Covered: All medical procedures including: Cardiology (all heart diseases, bypass, angioplasty, pacemaker), Cancer (all types - surgery, chemo, radio), Neurology (stroke, epilepsy, Parkinson's, brain surgery), Orthopedics (joint replacement, spine surgery, fractures), Nephrology (dialysis, transplant), Respiratory (asthma, COPD, pneumonia, TB), Gastroenterology (ulcers, liver disease, pancreatitis), Endocrinology (diabetes, thyroid disorders), Ophthalmology (cataract, glaucoma, retinal surgery), Dental (extractions, fillings, root canal, orthodontics), ENT (tonsillectomy, sinus surgery, ear surgery), Gynecology (hysterectomy, ovarian surgeries), Urology (prostate, kidney stones, bladder), Dermatology (skin procedures), Emergency conditions (heart attack, stroke, accidents, poisoning), Mental health (psychiatric hospitalization), AYUSH treatments (Ayurveda, Homeopathy, Unani, Yoga), Diagnostic tests (all pathology, radiology)

All medical conditions including: Occupational diseases, Tuberculosis, Pneumonia, Asthma, Diabetes, Hypertension, Heart diseases, Kidney diseases, Liver disorders, Cancer, Neurological disorders, Orthopedic conditions, Eye diseases, Dental problems, Maternity care, Family planning, Immunizations, OPD diseases (fever, cough, cold, infections), Chronic diseases, Accidents and injuries, Mental health conditions, Skin diseases, Communicable diseases, Non-communicable diseases, Emergency medical care, Preventive healthcare
Not Covered: Limited exclusions for very experimental treatments

Diseases Covered: All medical conditions: Cardiology, Oncology, Neurology, Orthopedics, Nephrology, Ophthalmology, ENT, Dental, General surgery, Gastroenterology, Pulmonology, Dermatology, Psychiatry, Emergency care, Chronic diseases (diabetes, hypertension, thyroid), Cancer treatments, Organ transplants, Joint replacements, Cardiac surgeries, Brain surgeries, Spinal surgeries, AYUSH treatments, Prosthetics, Rehabilitation services, Preventive healthcare

Accident insurance only: Accidental death, Permanent total disability, Permanent partial disability, Injuries from accidents (fractures, burns, trauma), Loss of limbs, Loss of sight, Multiple injuries from single accident
Not Covered: Natural death, Disease-related death, Suicide, War, Nuclear incidents, Pre-existing disabilities

Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
Diseases Covered: Life insurance covering death from: Any cause (natural or accidental), Heart attack, Stroke, Cancer, Kidney failure, Liver failure, Respiratory failure, Diabetes complications, Infections, Accidents, Any medical condition leading to death
Not Covered: Suicide within first year, War, Nuclear incidents

Scheme Name: Dr. YSR Aarogyasri Health Care Trust (Andhra Pradesh)
Diseases Covered: 2,446 procedures: All cardiac procedures, All cancer treatments, Neurosurgery, Kidney dialysis and transplant, Liver transplant, Bone marrow transplant, Hip and knee replacement, Spinal surgeries, Burns treatment, Neonatal intensive care, Polytrauma, Eye surgeries, ENT procedures, Dental surgeries, Gastrointestinal surgeries, Thoracic surgeries, Vascular surgeries, Plastic surgery (reconstructive), Pediatric surgeries, Gynecological procedures

Scheme Name: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (CMCHIS) - Tamil Nadu

1,400+ procedures: All cardiac diseases, All cancers, Neurosurgery, Orthopedic surgeries, Kidney diseases, Liver diseases, Respiratory diseases, Gastroenterology, Ophthalmology, ENT, Gynecology, Urology, Pediatric care, Neonatal care, Plastic surgery (reconstructive), Burns, Trauma, Mental health hospitalization, Infectious diseases, Chronic disease management

All PM-JAY procedures: Heart diseases, Cancer (all types), Kidney diseases, Neurological conditions, Orthopedic conditions, Liver diseases, Respiratory diseases, Gastrointestinal diseases, Eye diseases, ENT conditions, Maternity care, Pediatric care, Burns, Trauma, Emergency care, Chronic diseases, Infectious diseases, Surgical procedures across all specialties

1,396 packages: Cardiology (all heart procedures), Oncology (all cancer treatments), Neurology and Neurosurgery, Orthopedics (joint replacement, spine surgery), Nephrology (dialysis, transplant), Gastroenterology, Pulmonology, Ophthalmology, ENT, Urology, General surgery, Gynecology, Pediatrics, Neonatology, Plastic surgery (reconstructive), Burns, Emergency care

Scheme Name: Ayushman Bharat PMJAY SEHAT - Jammu & Kashmir
Target Beneficiaries: All residents of J&K (21+ lakh families)
Diseases Covered: All PM-JAY procedures (1,929 procedures): Universal coverage for all major medical conditions including cardiology, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, nephrology, gastroenterology, pulmonology, ophthalmology, ENT, gynecology, pediatrics, neonatology, emergency care, trauma care, burns, mental health hospitalization, infectious diseases, chronic diseases

Maternity care: Normal delivery, Cesarean section, Pregnancy complications, Pre-natal care, Post-natal care, Delivery-related emergencies, Newborn care, Maternal infections, Hypertensive disorders of pregnancy, Gestational diabetes, Hemorrhage, Eclampsia

Child health screening for: Birth defects, Congenital heart disease, Neural tube defects, Cleft lip/palate, Clubfoot, Developmental hip dysplasia, Hearing impairment, Vision problems, Developmental delays, Blood disorders (thalassemia, sickle cell), Thyroid disorders, Rheumatic heart disease, Dental problems, Nutritional deficiencies, Childhood cancers, Autism spectrum disorders
